name: locale-upstream-strftime-weekday-month
compat_reason: jq 1.8.2 for Windows emits non-UTF-8 mojibake for localized strftime names in this release artifact; jqx emits UTF-8 English names
compat_removal_condition: jq Windows release artifacts emit stable UTF-8 strftime names or jqx intentionally adopts platform-locale encoded output
